def negative_intermediate_dataframe_not_freed():
    rule_id = "intermediate_dataframe_not_freed"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Multiple intermediate DataFrames accumulate with no visible cleanup in one pipeline."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
